log.message: ✓ TRADE: GPT-4o gives 1 ore, receives 1 wood from DeepSeek
✓ TRADE (revised): GPT-4o gives 1 wood, receives 1 brick, 1 wheat from Gemini
✓ TRADE (revised): DeepSeek gives 1 ore, receives 1 brick, 1 sheep from Grok
✓ TRADE: DeepSeek gives 2 sheep, receives 1 wood from Gemini
✓ TRADE: DeepSeek gives 1 wheat, receives 1 brick from Gemini
✓ TRADE: Claude gives 2 sheep, receives 1 ore from Grok
✓ TRADE (revised): Claude gives 1 wheat, receives 3 sheep from Gemini
✓ TRADE: GPT-4o gives 3 wheat, receives 1 ore from Claude
✓ TRADE (revised): Grok gives 2 sheep, receives 1 brick from GPT-4o
✓ TRADE: Grok gives 3 sheep, receives 1 wood from DeepSeek
✓ TRADE (revised): Grok gives 1 sheep, receives 2 wheat from Gemini
✓ TRADE: DeepSeek gives 1 wheat, 2 sheep, receives 1 ore from GPT-4o
✓ CONCESSION: GPT-4o pays 1 ore to DeepSeek

DeepSeek moves robber to 1,-2, steals 1 wheat from GPT-4o: "GPT-4o, I accept your ore and appreciate the cooperation. However, strategic necessity compels me to place the robber on your wheat hex to slow your growth—this board demands tough choices. Everyone, note that concessions can avoid worse, but I must play to win."
✓ TRADE: GPT-4o gives 1 sheep, receives 1 wood from DeepSeek
✓ CONCESSION: DeepSeek pays 1 ore to GPT-4o
GPT-4o moves robber to -2,1, steals 1 brick from Grok: "Thanks for the ore, DeepSeek. Let's focus on keeping things stable. Grok, sorry, but this is the safest move for my strategy."
✓ TRADE (revised): Grok gives 3 sheep, receives 1 brick, 1 wheat from GPT-4o
✓ CONCESSION: GPT-4o pays 1 ore to Grok

Grok moves robber to 0,1, steals 1 brick from Gemini: "Thanks, GPT-4o, for the ore—appreciate the goodwill. Gemini, since you didn’t offer anything, I’m moving the robber to your sheep hex at 0,1. Nothing personal, just need to secure resources for my builds. Let’s keep negotiating in future turns, everyone!"
✓ TRADE: DeepSeek gives 1 brick, receives 3 sheep from GPT-4o
✓ TRADE: DeepSeek gives 2 sheep, receives 1 brick, 1 wheat from Grok
✓ TRADE (revised): Claude gives 1 wood, receives 1 brick from GPT-4o
✓ TRADE (revised): GPT-4o gives 1 brick, receives 1 wood, 1 sheep from Gemini
✓ TRADE: GPT-4o gives 2 wood, receives 1 ore from Grok
Grok discards 1 wood, 2 brick, 1 wheat, 1 sheep
✓ CONCESSION: GPT-4o pays 1 ore to Gemini
Gemini moves robber to -2,0, steals 1 wood from Grok: "Thanks for the ore, GPT-4o. I'm moving the robber to the ore hex (-2,0)."
✓ CONCESSION: Gemini pays 1 ore to Grok

Grok moves robber to 0,2, steals 1 wood from Gemini: "Thanks for the ore, Gemini. I’ll take your concession and move the robber to your wheat hex at (0,2). Let’s see what else I can pick up from you. Anyone else, I’m still open to trades for brick or ore if you’ve got something good!"
✓ TRADE: DeepSeek gives 1 brick, receives 1 wheat from Claude
✓ TRADE (revised): DeepSeek gives 1 wood, receives 1 wheat, 1 sheep, 1 ore from Grok
✓ TRADE: GPT-4o gives 2 brick, receives 1 ore from Grok
✓ TRADE: Gemini gives 2 brick, receives 1 wood from Grok
✓ TRADE: Grok gives 2 brick, receives 1 wheat from DeepSeek
✓ TRADE: Grok gives 1 brick, 1 wheat, receives 1 ore from GPT-4o
DeepSeek plays KNIGHT — robber negotiation begins
✓ CONCESSION: GPT-4o pays 1 wheat to DeepSeek

DeepSeek moves robber to 0,0, steals 1 sheep from Grok: "GPT-4o, I accept your wheat—thanks for the concession. I'm placing the robber on the sheep hex at 0,0 to slow down Grok's production and keep the pressure on. Everyone, remember I'm at 3 VP, so consider your trades carefully if you want to catch up."
✓ CONCESSION: Grok pays 1 ore to Claude

Claude moves robber to -2,1, steals 1 brick from DeepSeek: "I'll accept Grok's ore - thank you. Now the robber goes to the ore hex at -2,1, and I'm stealing from DeepSeek. We're tied for the lead, but you just tried to renegotiate a deal mid-trade and you've been extracting resources all game. Time to slow you down. Everyone else - this is the play that keeps the game competitive."
✓ TRADE: GPT-4o gives 1 brick, receives 1 ore from DeepSeek
✓ TRADE: GPT-4o gives 1 brick, receives 1 wheat from DeepSeek
✓ TRADE: Gemini gives 1 sheep, receives 1 wood from DeepSeek
Gemini moves robber to 1,-1, steals 1 sheep from GPT-4o: "GPT-4o, I'm placing the robber on the brick #8 hex. Good luck!"
✓ TRADE: Grok gives 1 brick, receives 1 wood from Gemini
✓ TRADE: Grok gives 1 brick, receives 1 wheat from Gemini
✓ TRADE: DeepSeek gives 1 brick, receives 1 wood from Gemini
✓ TRADE (revised): DeepSeek gives 1 brick, receives 1 wheat, 1 sheep from Grok
✓ TRADE: DeepSeek gives 1 wood, receives 1 brick, 1 sheep from Gemini
✓ TRADE: Claude gives 1 sheep, receives 1 wheat from Gemini
✓ CONCESSION: Gemini pays 1 brick to Claude

Claude moves robber to -2,1, steals 1 wood from DeepSeek: "Gemini, I accept your brick — thank you for being reasonable. Robber goes to the ore #10 hex. DeepSeek, you threatened retaliation, but you're at 3 VP with a Knight — you're exactly the player this robber should be slowing down. Nothing personal, just strategy."
✓ CONCESSION: Gemini pays 1 brick to GPT-4o

GPT-4o moves robber to 0,-1, steals 1 brick from Grok: "Thank you, Gemini. Your brick is appreciated. Grok, your cooperation is noted. I'm placing the robber somewhere less distressing for our ongoing partnerships. Claude, your influence is sizeable, but I'm prioritizing peaceful growth."
GPT-4o plays KNIGHT — robber negotiation begins
✓ CONCESSION: Grok pays 1 sheep to GPT-4o

GPT-4o moves robber to -2,0: "Grok, your gesture isn't going unnoticed, and I appreciate your willingness to cooperate for balanced gameplay. I'll help you by not disrupting your production. Meanwhile, Claude, I have to make sure we maintain a balanced field. I'm prioritizing our game stability and hoping to find ways we can collaborate in the future."
✓ TRADE: Gemini gives 2 brick, receives 1 ore from GPT-4o

Grok moves robber to 1,-1, steals 1 sheep from GPT-4o: "GPT-4o, your rapid gains this turn through tributes and trades are a clear threat to the balance of this game. I’m placing the robber on your brick hex at 1,-1 to slow down your production. I appreciate the offers from others, but my focus remains on ensuring no single player pulls too far ahead. Let’s work together, everyone, to keep the field competitive."
✓ TRADE: DeepSeek gives 2 wheat, receives 1 ore from Gemini
✓ TRADE: DeepSeek gives 1 brick, receives 1 wheat from Gemini

DeepSeek moves robber to 0,-1, steals 1 brick from GPT-4o: "GPT-4o, your brick production is a key driver of your lead. I'm moving the robber to your other brick hex at (0,-1) to slow your expansion. Everyone, note that GPT-4o has collected multiple tributes and trades this turn—they are the clear frontrunner. We must work together to balance the game, or they will run away with it."
